title: goniophlebium amamianum
intro: Goniophlebium amamianum, also known as Amami shield fern, is a species of fern native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, antidiarrheal, and expectorant properties. Goniophlebium amamianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
